addressing.selection_rule: A0/A1/A2 pins set 3 LSBs of 7-bit address. POR default with all address pins LOW is 0x20.

notes: PCF8574 has no internal registers. I2C write sets all 8 I/O pin output levels; I2C read returns current input states.
POR default: all I/Os are HIGH (input mode with internal weak pull-up).
Quasi-bidirectional I/O: writing 1 = input/high-impedance (default), writing 0 = output LOW with strong drive.
INT pin asserts LOW when any input changes state from the last read; cleared by reading the port.
